overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character walking alongside a horse through a dark, foggy forest at night. The atmospheric scene features a lantern illuminating the dirt path as they traverse the dense woodland environment.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark foggy forest trail at night, with a character and horse walking forward. A large rock formation dominates the right side of the path, which the group passes by as they proceed deeper into the woods, illuminated only by their lantern light.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk with the horse through the forest, maintaining steady progress along the trail

horse continuing along the forest path with the group

entered.detail: dense shrubs and low vegetation beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The group continues their journey through the dense forest interior after passing the rock formation. The trail remains narrow and foggy, surrounded by tall trees and undergrowth, with the lantern casting long shadows on the dirt path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, foggy forest trail as a character and horse venture deeper into the nocturnal woodland. It begins by tracking the group as they pass a large rock formation that dominates the right side of the path, with the scene illuminated only by the glow of a lantern. As they move beyond the rock, the camera follows them further into the dense forest interior where the trail remains narrow and shrouded in mist. The scene then shifts to emphasize the oppressive scale of the environment, with the lantern casting long, flickering shadows against the surrounding tall trees and thick undergrowth.
